name: Pantheon WebOps Platform API
what_it_does: Managed WordPress and Drupal WebOps platform with REST API (Terminus CLI) — enabling development teams to manage site environments, deployments, database cloning, and multidev (feature branch environments) via API and CLI, with automated testing, edge caching, code deployment workflows, and a developer-friendly Git-based workflow for both WordPress and Drupal.
use_cases: Automating WordPress/Drupal site deployments via Pantheon Terminus API for CI/CD pipelines
Creating multidev environments via Pantheon API for feature branch testing
Cloning databases between environments via Pantheon API for staging refresh automation
Managing site backups via Pantheon API for disaster recovery automation
Triggering cache purges via Pantheon API for content delivery automation
not_for: Non-WordPress/Drupal applications (Pantheon supports only WordPress and Drupal)
Teams needing lowest-cost managed hosting (Pantheon is premium pricing)
Simple hosting without development workflow features (use WP Engine or Kinsta for simpler)
best_when: A WordPress or Drupal agency or development team needs a sophisticated WebOps platform — where Pantheon's multidev environments, Git-based deployment workflows, and Terminus CLI API enable automated testing and CI/CD for enterprise CMS projects.
avoid_when: You need non-WordPress/Drupal hosting, are on a tight budget, or don't need multidev branch environments.

auth.notes: Machine tokens (API tokens) for automation and CI/CD. User-scoped tokens. Bearer token via Authorization header. Terminus CLI (primary programmatic interface) uses machine token. REST API available directly. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — permissions via Pantheon user roles (Developer, Team Member, Admin). Quicksilver platform hooks for event-driven workflows (webhook-like). Terminus is the official PHP CLI/SDK.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free production tier; sandbox sites available for development
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic $50/month (1 site); Performance from $175/month (5 sites); Elite custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Founded 2010 by Josh Koenig and Zack Rosen (Drupal community leaders). Raised $175M total (Series D $100M, 2018). 300,000+ sites. WordPress AND Drupal — one of few platforms supporting both. Multidev: feature branch environments (unique advantage). Autopilot: automated WordPress/Drupal updates. Global CDN (Fastly-based). AGCDN (Advanced Global CDN) add-on. Elite Frontier Plan for highest-scale. New Relic monitoring included. Quicksilver platform hooks for automation. Used by: Duke University, Stanford, Time Inc., Clorox. Agency-focused business model. GDPR compliant.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API + Terminus CLI as primary programmatic interface. Machine token auth. Quicksilver hooks for event automation. SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA. WordPress and Drupal only. Multidev branch environments unique feature. Terminus PHP CLI is the recommended interface.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Site reads idempotent by site ID. Environment reads idempotent. Deployment (code push) not idempotent — verify environment state before pushing. Database clone not idempotent — replaces destination.
known_agent_gotchas: Terminus CLI (PHP) is primary programmatic interface — REST API exists but Terminus is recommended
Machine token required for CI/CD — different from user login token; create via dashboard
WordPress-only and Drupal-only — no other PHP frameworks or Node.js supported
Multidev environments have naming limits: lowercase letters and numbers only, max 11 characters
Quicksilver hooks replace webhooks — triggered by platform events (deploy, sync, etc.)
US-only data residency — not suitable for EU-only data requirements

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA (with BAA). Machine token auth. Role-based access (Developer/Team/Admin). Fastly CDN DDoS protection. US data residency. Two-factor authentication for accounts. Git-based deployment reduces direct server access. HIPAA-eligible for healthcare WordPress/Drupal sites with BAA.
